feature.label: Orient AXLR8 Lite — AI ABAP Chat
feature.description:
AXLR8 Lite — the free, open-source AI chat plugin for SAP ABAP development.
Adds an AI chat panel to Eclipse that's tuned for ABAP: • 2 LLM providers — Claude Code (via your Claude Pro/Max subscription) or GitHub Models (via your GitHub PAT, free for Copilot subscribers) • Read active editor — chat sees the ABAP file you're working on • EHP8 / S/4HANA mode toggle — AI respects your SAP target version • Apply suggestions to the active editor
Open source under Apache 2.0. Source on GitHub: https://github.com/Orient-CDS-Pvt-Ltd/AXLR8-Lite
For live SAP context, code generation, safe deploy, AI Fix loops, TSD docs, 4 more LLM providers, and 16 more chat modes — see the full AXLR8 + ACTV8 plugin.
feature.copyright: Copyright 2026 OrientCDS Private Limited. Licensed under Apache 2.0.
